events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: field-service, spool erection & fit-up, flange bolt-hole rotation wrong (two-holing missed). Work roughed in but not closed. Reference ASME B31.3, iso drawings. Treat as roughly 70% complete until defects corrected.

Need produce JSON matching schema. decision: fail because non-compliant/defective. risk: high? Flange bolt-hole rotation wrong (two-holing missed) is a significant defect in piping; can cause leakage, improper gasket compression, misalignment. In operating asset maybe critical? But likely high. component_conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. percent_complete: 70 (as instructed). value: maybe 0 unless numeric reading; not asked. sound_source etc default empty string/0. confidence: 1.0. event_time 0.0. rate 0.0. order: maybe steps? Not asked; can leave empty list. workable: activity IDs that can still start? Not asked; empty list. findings: "Flange bolt-hole rotation is incorrect (two-holing missed)". actions: "Loosen flange bolts, rotate flange to correct bolt-hole orientation per project iso drawings and ASME B31.3, re-torque to spec, verify alignment and bolt pattern." rationale: brief. references: ["ASME B31.3", "project iso drawings"].

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside JSON.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":false,"risk":"high","work_stage":"rough-complete","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":70,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":1.0,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Flange bolt-hole rotation is incorrect: two-holing was missed, so the flange is not oriented per the project iso drawing and ASME B31.3 requirements."],"actions":["Isolate and de-energize the line if required for safe access.","Loosen the flange joint, rotate the flange/spool to the correct bolt-hole orientation.","Reassemble with proper gasket alignment and bolt-hole orientation.","Torque bolts to specification in the required pattern.","Re-inspect and document bolt-hole rotation before close-out."],"rationale":"A flange installed with the wrong bolt-hole rotation violates project drawings and ASME B31.3 fit-up requirements. It can cause gasket misalignment, uneven bolt load, and leak potential, so the installation is defective and must be corrected before the work can progress or be accepted.","references":["ASME B31.3","project iso drawings"]}
